caption: A man wearing a distinctive tall, grey, textured wig, glasses, and over-ear headphones sits in a recording studio. He is dressed in a white button-down shirt with a red bow tie and tan suspenders. A professional microphone on a boom arm is positioned in front of him. In the background, the walls are decorated with various framed photographs and clothing displays, including garments with the "LEE" logo. On-screen graphics feature a logo with the text "BOSS TALK JOY" and "PODCAST" appearing beside a microphone icon. Throughout the sequence, the man remains seated, looking slightly to his left with a neutral expression. His head moves subtly, and his mouth opens slightly as if speaking, while the background and equipment remain stationary.
